creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/news/newsflash.html#event20170701:01

This text:
    1 July: The first RC build for the FreeBSD 11.1 release cycle is now available. ISO images for the amd64, armv6, i386, aarch64, powerpc, powerpc64 and sparc64 architectures are available on most of our FreeBSD mirror sites.

Word "available" is a link to
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2017-June/087340.html
but real announce is on link
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2017-July/087340.html
